name: What evidence do I need if an AEO agency scams my practice?
description: Contracts, metrics, screenshots, losses.[1] Document everything.

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need if an AEO agency scams my practice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Contracts, metrics, screenshots, losses.[1] Document everything.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Gather contracts, invoices, performance reports, AI query screenshots, and financial loss records to prove AEO scam claims.** This supports fraud or breach theories.[1]

Solid evidence is crucial as AEO lacks standardized benchmarks.[9] Applies nationwide.

**Key factors:**
- Before/after traffic/AI citation data.
- Communications promising results.
- Competitor comparisons.
- Damage calculations (lost cases).

Organize chronologically; use tools like SEMrush for metrics. File FTC complaint alongside civil suit for leverage.
